## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (bump major or pre-1.0 minor)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff + mypy + pytest)
- [ ] New code has tests (or a justification in the PR description)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an `[Unreleased]` entry describing the change
- [ ] README / `docs/` updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private paths in the diff
